Description: AWS Security Hub integration configuration for AI SOC — aggregates findings from GuardDuty, Inspector, Config, and Macie into a unified EventBridge pipeline for ARIA to process

GuardDuty.Description: Amazon GuardDuty findings are automatically imported into Security Hub

Inspector.Description: Amazon Inspector vulnerability findings for EC2 and Lambda

Config.Description: AWS Config compliance findings for security rule violations

Macie.Description: Amazon Macie sensitive data discovery findings for S3 buckets

EventBridgeRule.Description: Routes Security Hub findings to the AISoc-alerttrigger Lambda for ARIA processing

AutomationRules.Description: Automatically archive LOW severity findings to reduce noise
Ensure all CRITICAL findings are routed to ARIA within 60 seconds

Note.Text: Auto-escalated to ARIA for immediate triage

_deployment_notes.prerequisite: GuardDuty must be enabled first (see docs/DEPLOYMENT.md Phase 7)
_deployment_notes.cost_note: Security Hub has a 30-day free trial. After trial, pricing is per finding per month.
